component.name: Roselt Calculator
component.summary: Calculator with scientific, graphing, programmer, and conversion modes

description.p: Roselt Calculator is an installable desktop calculator with standard, scientific, programmer, graphing, date calculation, history, memory, and unit conversion workflows.

It is designed for fast keyboard and touch workflows, ships with multiple themes, supports a wide range of interface languages, and includes an offline-friendly interface for everyday and advanced math.

ul.li: Switch between standard, scientific, programmer, graphing, date, and converter modes.
Use history, memory, and graph tools in the same app shell.
Customize the interface with theme and language settings.

screenshot.caption: Standard mode with history and memory access.
Scientific functions in the desktop layout.
Graphing mode with an expression plotted in real time.
Unit conversion workflows including currency conversion.

description.p: Introduces the Roselt Calculator branding, expanded language support, new themes, and the live themes showcase page.
